text:
Once upon a brisk winter dusk, there fluttered a tiny moth inside an owl pellet.My wings buzzed,hoping,I flutteraxed.

What luck,I'd think.I'd find somewhere cozy.And I flutterdid!

I swooped softly.

Then froze,I saw.An owl.I felt dizzy.Owl!

I blinked.I know!

I flutter flew,flew.

Never.

I escaped,owl,flew,I did!

I flutter landed.I think.

I nibbled some berries.Then my legs.

Well,a little,barks.

I flutter slept.I dreamed.I flew fast.

And came I saw,owl.I knew.

You flew,ofternoon,I think.My heart.

You know,I hear.

You love.

There!

I smiled.

You're silly.Owl!


That'sokay.I know.I love.You.

I think.

That'syou.I adore.That thing.

You'remything.Owl!

It waslove.I think.

Now.I'll dream.I hope.

Of moths,birds,flying.I think.
